TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_satalakaway, title = satalakaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/satalakaway} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:最高的) u satakalaway kaku i cacudadan. 在學校我的個子最高.
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:***) u satakar~ɾawaj kaku i ʦaʦudadan. *********.
S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:最高的) u satakalaway kaku i cacudadan. 在學校我的個子最高.
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:***) u satakar~ɾawaj kaku i ʦaʦudadan. *********.
